comment: Речь Алого Пророка в домике каннибалов

languages.text: "Подойди ближе, дитя! Вкуси плоть Бессмертного, дабы причаститься к Алым братьям и сестрам. И да нести волю Его — кровью собственной и жертвенной!"

traits.locale_text: "Подойди ближе, дитя! Вкуси плоть Бессмертного, дабы причаститься к Алым братьям и сестрам. И да нести волю Его — кровью собственной и жертвенной!"
"Подойди ближе, дитя! Вкуси плоть Бессмертного, дабы причаститься к Алым братьям и сестрам. И да нести волю Его — кровью собственной и жертвенной!"

languages.text: "Come closer, child! Feast on the flesh of the Immortal to receive the sacrament of the Crimson brothers and sisters. May you carry out His will by spilling blood, your own and sacrificial!"
languages.original_text: "Подойди ближе, дитя! Вкуси плоть Бессмертного, дабы причаститься к Алым братьям и сестрам. И да нести волю Его — кровью собственной и жертвенной!"

traits.locale_text: "Come closer, child! Feast on the flesh of the Immortal to receive the sacrament of the Crimson brothers and sisters. May you carry out His will by spilling blood, your own and sacrificial!"
"Come closer, child! Feast on the flesh of the Immortal to receive the sacrament of the Crimson brothers and sisters. May you carry out His will by spilling blood, your own and sacrificial!"
"Come closer, child! Feast on the flesh of the Immortal to receive the sacrament of the Crimson brothers and sisters. May you carry out His will by spilling blood, your own and sacrificial!"

languages.text: "Komm näher, Kind! Genieße das Fleisch des Unsterblichen, um das Sakrament der Crimson-Brüder und -Schwestern zu empfangen. Mögest du seinen Willen erfüllen, indem du Blut vergießt, dein eigenes und das der Opfer!"
languages.original_text: "Come closer, child! Feast on the flesh of the Immortal to receive the sacrament of the Crimson brothers and sisters. May you carry out His will by spilling blood, your own and sacrificial!"

languages.text: "Approche-toi, mon enfant ! Régale-toi de la chair de l'Immortel pour recevoir le sacrement des frères et sœurs Crimson. Puisses-tu accomplir sa volonté en versant du sang, le tien et celui du sacrifice !"
languages.original_text: "Come closer, child! Feast on the flesh of the Immortal to receive the sacrament of the Crimson brothers and sisters. May you carry out His will by spilling blood, your own and sacrificial!"

languages.text: "靠近点，孩子！享用不朽者的血肉，接受深红兄弟姐妹的圣礼。愿你用自己的鲜血和献祭的鲜血来执行他的旨意！"
languages.original_text: "Come closer, child! Feast on the flesh of the Immortal to receive the sacrament of the Crimson brothers and sisters. May you carry out His will by spilling blood, your own and sacrificial!"

languages.text: "¡Acércate, niña! Date un festín con la carne del Inmortal para recibir el sacramento de los hermanos y hermanas Carmesí. ¡Que cumplas Su voluntad derramando sangre, propia y sacrificada!"
languages.original_text: "Come closer, child! Feast on the flesh of the Immortal to receive the sacrament of the Crimson brothers and sisters. May you carry out His will by spilling blood, your own and sacrificial!"

languages.text: 「もっと近くに来なさい！クリムゾンの兄弟姉妹の秘跡を受けるために、不死身の肉に饗応しなさい。血を流すことによって、主の意志を遂行するのだ。
languages.original_text: "Come closer, child! Feast on the flesh of the Immortal to receive the sacrament of the Crimson brothers and sisters. May you carry out His will by spilling blood, your own and sacrificial!"

languages.text: "Yaklaş, çocuk! Kızıl kardeşlerin kutsamasını almak için Ölümsüz'ün etiyle ziyafet çek. Kendi ve kurban kanını dökerek O'nun isteğini yerine getirebilirsin!"
languages.original_text: "Come closer, child! Feast on the flesh of the Immortal to receive the sacrament of the Crimson brothers and sisters. May you carry out His will by spilling blood, your own and sacrificial!"
